title: MCreative SMP
body:
![MCreative SMP Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QVCcP8fs/images/afee3fcc91936f767d6a495ba3386ec23428ca78.png)


# Welcome to MCreative SMP

MCreative SMP is a mod pack hosted for the MCreative Discord Server.

We strive to showcase, support mods created by our growing community, and to create a server where anyone can add, create, or make a difference.
Anyone with the ambition to learn or create is welcome to join and help us build a pack that can show off how good MCreator can be in the right hands!  
As the pack grows, mods will continue to be added/removed until we end up with something truly special!


## Official Server
- Please join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/XHNSGzMsXa) if you want to join the SMP.
- It is highly recommended to submit your MCreator mods if you made any that you think would be a nice addition to the SMP.


### SMP Rules
1. No Cheats/XRays
2. Read the rest of the rules over on the Discord server


## Submission Requirements
*Make all submissions over on our Discord Server*
1. Mod Title
2. Mod Description
4. A detailed explanation as to why your mod should be added
  
## Season Info  
The Current season is "Vibe Check" a building/peaceful season!
